output.summary: Add conditional top padding to the Text block's right column (discourse div) when eyebrow is present, matching the ThemeHeading internal alignment pattern.

fileChanges.description: Add conditional md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)] class to the discourse div when eyebrow attribute is present
fileChanges.details: On line 66, change the static className on the discourse div to use a conditional class. When attributes.eyebrow is truthy, add 'md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)]' to the existing classes 'discourse md:col-start-2'. Use template literal or cn() utility for conditional class application. Example: className={`discourse md:col-start-2${attributes.eyebrow ? ' md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)]' : ''}`} or use the cn() utility if already imported.

fileChanges.description: Add conditional md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)] class to the discourse div when $eyebrow is present
fileChanges.details: On line 44, change the static class on the discourse div to conditionally include the padding class. When $eyebrow is non-empty, add 'md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)]' alongside existing classes. Pattern: <div class="discourse md:col-start-2<?php echo ! empty( $eyebrow ) ? ' md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)]' : ''; ?>">. This mirrors the same conditional pattern used in parts/ThemeHeading.php line 78.

designDecisions.decision: Use md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)] on the right column conditionally when eyebrow is present
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested this class. It matches the existing ThemeHeading internal pattern (parts/ThemeHeading.tsx line 179, parts/ThemeHeading.php line 78) which offsets the second column's content to align below the eyebrow text height (0.875rem font size * 1.1 line-height + 1rem gap).

designDecisions.decision: Condition on eyebrow presence only, not on 2-column mode
designDecisions.evidence: The Text block is always in 2-column mode at md breakpoint (md:grid-cols-2 on line 47 of TSX). ThemeHeading uses columns={1} internally and the 2-col grid is at the block level. The padding only needs to be conditional on eyebrow presence since the grid is always 2-col.
